ksa_text: Build and deliver AI proof-of-concepts for high-priority use cases, documenting technical approach, results, limitations, and production readiness assessment.

dcwf.top_element_label: Design, develop, and implement AI tools and techniques to achieve organizational objectives.

eu_ai_act.top_element_label: Obligations of deployers of high-risk AI systems

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Obligations of deployers of high-risk AI systems
Design, develop, and implement AI tools and techniques to achieve organizational objectives.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-T-018 (AI, Task) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4781 is insufficient to establish relevance to analytics and business intelligence at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nist_ai_rmf=0.478, eu_ai_act=0.464, ddat=0.433) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4781 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does AI-domain KSA AI-T-018 (composite 0.4781) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4781 for AI domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act practitioner obligations; AI-adjacent competencies appear in senior analytics IC roles at awareness level only. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Data Analyst at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms AI domain KSA at composite 0.4781 is not a standard requirement for Data Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4781, domain AI, scope weak fit. High confidence.
